mnemonics: POWER: Power Optimization, Workload Efficiency, Energy-aware Resource management
keyPoints: Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling (DVFS) reduces power consumption
Server consolidation through virtualization minimizes idle energy waste
Algorithmic efficiency lowers computational resource requirements
commonMistakes: Focusing only on hardware efficiency while ignoring software optimization
Over-provisioning resources 'just in case' instead of right-sizing
Not monitoring energy consumption at the application level
